provenance.source: Phase 1 PRD and PolicyEngine reconnaissance notes plus Track 5 guided human verification on 2026-07-05
provenance.notes: Human-approved crosswalk with caveats preserved for fixture adapters and runner implementation. PolicyEngine and PRD sidecar agent reviews identified the earned-income correction and adapter caveats.

rows.label: SNAP state

mappings.notes: PolicyEngine situation household state code; formulas may use yearly state_code_str internally.
PRD numeric state FIPS; use table.statemap for abbreviation/name.

rows.definition: State jurisdiction for SNAP parameters and state-option routing.

rows.label: SNAP unit size

mappings.notes: Computed from SPM unit size minus ineligible students, immigration-ineligible members, and work-requirement-ineligible members; fixtures must explicitly set or constrain those surfaces.
PRD family size used in snapData join.

rows.definition: Number of people counted in the SNAP unit for benefit size and allotment.

rows.label: SNAP household member ages

mappings.notes: Use age as the SNAP-facing input; monthly_age exists but is not the USDA elderly-test input.
Adapter must place members deterministically into PRD fixed person slots.

sourceRefs: PRD function.snapBenefit elderly and kid count code
rows.definition: A deterministic ordered list of member ages used to determine elderly status, child status, and unit composition.

rows.label: SNAP elderly or disabled member present

mappings.notes: Derived inside function.snapBenefit from fixed age and disability inputs; not a direct PRD input column.

rows.definition: Whether the SNAP unit includes an elderly or disabled member for gross-test, asset-test, medical, and shelter-deduction logic.

rows.label: SNAP earned income, monthly

mappings.notes: Corrected during verification: self-employment flows through the SNAP self-employment income after expense deduction chain. Fixtures must normalize monthly values to PolicyEngine's period expectations.
PRD code treats income as annual in SNAP calculations; adapter must normalize.

rows.definition: Earned income counted for SNAP before the earned-income deduction, represented in a fixture-normalized monthly unit.

rows.label: SNAP unearned income, monthly

mappings.notes: Aggregate is correct; runner fixtures must populate the underlying PolicyEngine source variables.

mappings.ref: income.gift + income.child_support + income.investment + value.tanf + value.ssi + value.ssdi
mappings.notes: PRD aggregates these annual/value fields into income.gross; TANF/SSI may also affect categorical eligibility.

rows.definition: Unearned income counted for SNAP gross income, represented in a fixture-normalized monthly unit.

rows.label: SNAP dependent care expense, monthly

mappings.notes: Correct deduction variable; raw fixture input should map through childcare expenses and subsidies where applicable.
Deducted in SNAP adjusted income; direct runner must either construct it through PRD childcare code or set it intentionally.

rows.definition: Allowable dependent care expense used as a SNAP deduction.

rows.label: SNAP medical expense, monthly

mappings.notes: Input-side allowable expenses and computed monthly deduction must be kept distinct in adapter code.
Applies through SSI/SSDI/age tests and subtracts the annualized medical expense floor.

rows.definition: Medical expense considered for SNAP excess medical deduction for elderly or disabled members.

rows.label: SNAP shelter expense, monthly

mappings.notes: Shelter-cost surface is annual at the SPM-unit level and feeds monthly SNAP formulas through period conversion.
Used in PRD SNAP net-income calculation; high-level housing code may construct it after housing assistance.

rows.definition: Rent, mortgage, or other non-utility shelter expense before excess shelter deduction.

rows.label: SNAP utility expense, monthly

mappings.notes: This maps utility facts that select SUA/LUA/IUA/none, not a simple monthly utility-dollar amount.
PRD utility deduction logic uses these fields; verify whether BasicLimitedUtilityAllowance is needed for first-pass fixtures.

rows.definition: Utility facts used to determine the SNAP utility allowance and shelter deduction.

rows.label: SNAP countable assets

mappings.notes: Liquid-resource aggregate adds bank account, stock, and bond assets; TX BBCE vehicle value enters TANF non-cash asset testing separately.
PRD SNAP eligibility uses totalassets; local input construction may set totalassets from cash and vehicle fields, so vehicle handling must be explicit in adapters.

rows.definition: Resources counted against SNAP asset limits.

rows.label: BBCE gross income limit

mappings.notes: Gross limit is accurate, but BBCE is mediated through TANF non-cash eligibility; net-test and asset-test parameters must travel with it in runners.
Gross-limit fields are accurate for this row; PRD also carries BBCE_State, waiver, and asset columns separately.

rows.definition: State-specific broad-based categorical eligibility gross income threshold, expressed as a share of FPL or converted dollar threshold.

rows.label: SNAP eligibility

mappings.notes: Includes categorical eligibility plus student, work-requirement, and immigration gates.
Inferred initial comparator; unsafe for final classification without investigation because PRD direct function returns value only.

rows.definition: Whether the SNAP unit is eligible for a positive regular SNAP allotment in the comparison period.

rows.label: SNAP allotment

mappings.notes: Monthly PolicyEngine SPM-unit amount; for scoped non-DC 2026 fixtures this is acceptable, otherwise compare snap_normal_allotment to avoid emergency/DC add-ons.
PRD direct SNAP function returns annual snapValue; divide by 12 for monthly comparison.

rows.definition: Monthly SNAP benefit amount after eligibility, deductions, and expected contribution.
